title: Parking module, membership tiers, coupons, stored value, logistics master data, fulfillment requests
key_decisions: Parking session: entry recorded on POST /api/parking/:spaceId/enter; exit on PATCH /api/parking/:spaceId/exit; session duration calculated from createdAt delta
ParkingAlert: raised when space exceeds max_duration_minutes (configurable per lot); 15-minute SLA before auto-escalation to supervisor queue
Parking SLA: claimedAt timestamp set on first interaction; SLA clock starts from alert createdAt; escalation fires at 15 min via parking-escalation.worker.ts
Membership tiers: Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum with configurable discount_percent and points_multiplier; tier assignment is manual (admin) + auto-upgrade rule on points threshold
Coupon: single-use (consumed on fulfillment request approval), percent or fixed discount, min_order_value guard, optional tier_requirement, expiry_date
Stored value: system-wide feature flag (SystemSetting: stored_value_enabled); topUp/spend/balance endpoints; AES-256-GCM encrypted balance stored in DB; balance can be 0 but never negative
Fulfillment pricing pipeline: base_price * (1 - tier_discount) → apply coupon → subtract stored_value_spend → final_amount; all amounts in cents integer
Fulfillment state machine: draft → pending → approved → packed → shipped | rejected (terminal); state changes write to audit log
Logistics: Warehouse (name, address, capacity), Carrier (name, apiKey, circuitBreaker), DeliveryZone (name, baseRate, perKgRate), ShippingTemplate (carrier+zone combo with markup)
Jobs module: GET /api/jobs lists registered BullMQ queues with counts and last-run; POST /api/jobs/:name/trigger manually enqueues a job (Admin only)

frontend views created as full implementations (not stubs): parking operations, supervisor queue, membership tiers, coupons, fulfillment list/create/detail, stored value, logistics (carriers, warehouses, zones, templates)
files_updated: backend/src/routes/index.ts (parkingRoutes, parkingAlertRoutes, warehouseRoutes, carrierRoutes, deliveryZoneRoutes, shippingRoutes, membershipRoutes, couponRoutes, fulfillmentRoutes, storedValueRoutes, jobRoutes registered)
next_prompt: Prompt 5 — Classroom operations dashboard, anomaly lifecycle, real-time Socket.IO /classroom namespace
